tasks.title: Identify header bar component containing chat icon
tasks.description: Locate the React component or UI file responsible for rendering the header bar that includes the chat icon. Search for files in src/components or src/layouts that render header or navigation bar and contain chat icon references or imports.
acceptanceCriteria: The exact file and component rendering the header bar with chat icon is identified
tasks.expectedResult: The source file path and component name that renders the header bar with the chat icon is known

evidence: File path and component name identified
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the target file for modification to remove chat icon

tasks.title: Remove chat icon element from header bar component
tasks.description: Modify the identified header bar component file to remove the chat icon element. This includes deleting the JSX element or component that renders the chat icon, and removing any related imports or styles specific to the chat icon. Ensure no other header bar functionality is affected.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat icon element is removed from the header bar component JSX
No references to chat icon remain in the header bar component file
Header bar renders correctly without the chat icon
tasks.expectedResult: Header bar component no longer renders the chat icon and passes tests

outputPlan.description: Header bar component with chat icon element removed

metadata.inputContext: Identified header bar component file path
evidence: File modified with chat icon removed
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes chat icon from header bar UI

tasks.title: Validate UI renders correctly without chat icon
tasks.description: Run UI tests and perform visual verification to ensure the header bar renders correctly without the chat icon and no layout or functionality regressions occur. This includes running unit tests, integration tests, and optionally manual UI inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Header bar displays correctly without chat icon
No console errors or warnings related to header bar
tasks.expectedResult: UI tests pass and header bar renders correctly without chat icon

metadata.inputContext: Modified header bar component without chat icon
evidence: Visual inspection confirms absence of chat icon
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures removal of chat icon does not break UI
